case_title: LONDY M COLOMO VS. MARIA ALEJANDRA JIMENEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 6/5/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED MAR-18-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, MARIA ALEJANDRA

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLOMO, LONDY M ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-05-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF LUMP SUM OF $965.00 ON MAY 31, 2014.PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--NINA SAFDIE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $965.00 FILED BY COLOMO, LONDY M AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, MARIA ALEJANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-03-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEBTOR HAS PROMISED TO PAY CREDITOR BALANCE SUM OF $465.00 BY JUNE 30, 2014, AS STATED BY PLAINTIFF TO COURT.PLAINTIFF APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
